{{Quote|And you, Mukit. Clear up this mess. You're Ubese. You understand the proper way to dispose of the remains.|Ghez Hokan to Mukit|<ref name="HC">''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]''</ref>}}
'''Mukit''' was an [[Ubese/Legends|Ubese]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] who had been hired by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Ghez Hokan]] to work with him and several other mercenaries on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Qiilura/Legends|Qiilura]]. After [[Cailshh]]'s execution by Hokan for destroying farms with little to no provocation, Hokan ordered Mukit to bury Cailshh in the proper Ubese way.

{{Char-stub}}
